item.description:
### ✨ 本次更新
🎨 视觉与体验优化
- **焕新应用图标**：换上全新设计的 App Icon，视觉表达更契合应用的高效剪贴板定位。 - **界面细节打磨**：对部分界面的 UI 进行了微调，视觉呈现更加自然协调。
🚀 功能与交互增强
- **权限授权无缝衔接**：大幅优化辅助功能授权体验，现在点击“去系统设置授权”后，Clipaste 会自动出现在系统的辅助功能列表中，免去手动寻找的烦恼。 - **新增专属交流群**：新增了 Telegram 用户交流群组入口，欢迎随时加入，与我们聊聊你的想法和建议。
---
### ✨ What's New
🎨 Visual & UX Improvements
- **Brand New App Icon**: Upgraded to a newly designed icon that better reflects our core product philosophy and positioning. - **UI Refinements**: Made several minor visual adjustments across the app for a more polished and cohesive look.
🚀 Features & Enhancements
- **Seamless Authorization**: Optimized the Accessibility permission flow. Clicking "Open System Settings" will now automatically reveal Clipaste in the macOS settings list, saving you time. - **Join Our Community**: Added a link to our official Telegram group. Come hang out, share your feedback, and chat with us!

### ✨ 本次更新
🚀 功能与体验增强
- **全新链接展示模式**：新增「丰富模式」（默认开启），直观呈现网页标题、图标及域名信息。如果您更偏爱极简外观，也可在「高级 - 链接显示模式」中随时切换。 - **链接快捷操作**：为 URL 卡片新增了右键菜单，现在可以直接呼出菜单并在默认浏览器中快速打开该链接。
🐛 修复与优化
- **Dock 栏图标逻辑**：修复了应用后台运行时，图标仍然异常常驻 macOS Dock 栏的问题，让应用更纯粹地在状态栏默默工作。 - **首次启动体验修复**：修复了全新安装后，首次同时打开剪切板与设置页时，点击设置页面会导致窗口意外隐藏的 Bug。 - **国际化翻译补全**：完善了部分界面和极端场景下的多语言显示，提升不同语言环境下的使用体验。
---
### ✨ What's New
🚀 Features & Enhancements
- **New URL Display Modes**: Introducing "Rich Mode" (enabled by default) to intuitively display web titles, favicons, and domains. You can easily switch back to the minimal mode in Advanced Settings. - **URL Context Menu**: Added a handy right-click menu to URL cards, allowing you to quickly open links directly in your default browser.
🐛 Bug Fixes & Improvements
- **Dock Icon Behavior**: Fixed an issue where the app icon would persistently and incorrectly remain in the macOS Dock. - **First-Launch Experience**: Resolved a bug that caused the window to unexpectedly hide when interacting with the settings page immediately after a fresh installation. - **Localization Updates**: Completed missing multi-language translations across various scenarios to improve the experience for global users.

### ✨ 本次更新
🎨 视觉与体验优化
- **新增自定义主题色**：支持多种品牌色自由切换，快去设置中选择你的专属色彩吧。 - **UI 界面全面升级**：外观设计深度适配系统原生风格，视觉观感更加精致和谐。 - **图标细节优化**：修复了自定义分组图标在部分场景下显示过大的问题，布局更美观。
⚙️ 性能与稳定性
- **快捷键逻辑优化**：修复了特定场景下快捷键冲突的问题，操作响应更准确。 - **底层性能调优**：优化了部分极端场景下的运行效率，使用过程更加丝滑顺畅。
---
### ✨ What's New
🎨 Visual & UX Improvements
- **New Theme Colors**: Added support for customizable theme colors. Go pick your favorite one now! - **System-Native Design**: Re-aligned the UI design with system standards for a more integrated look and feel. - **Icon Display Fix**: Resolved an issue where custom group icons appeared oversized in certain views.
⚙️ Performance & Stability
- **Shortcut Conflict Fix**: Fixed shortcut key conflicts in specific scenarios for a more reliable workflow. - **Performance Optimization**: Improved system performance in various use cases to ensure a smoother experience.
